message:
fix(core): DST-safe backup scheduling, dataflow cycle detection, and search cleanup

backup.rs — Fix DST transition failures in schedule computation:
- next_hourly: perform arithmetic in UTC then convert back to Local,
  avoiding chrono panics when local-time minute manipulation hits a
  DST gap (spring-forward) or ambiguous fold (fall-back).
- next_daily: try today first; if the target local time doesn't exist
  (DST gap), fall through to tomorrow instead of returning an error.
- next_weekly: use .earliest() instead of .single() when localizing
  the computed NaiveDateTime, so fall-back ambiguity resolves to the
  first occurrence rather than failing.

dataflow.rs — Fix incorrect BFS direction in cycle detection:
- would_create_cycle was BFS-ing from `from` looking for `to` via
  outputs, but the correct check for adding edge from->to is to BFS
  from `to` following outputs looking for `from`. The old direction
  could miss real cycles and false-positive on non-cycles.
- Also: replace i[0].clone() with i.first().cloned().unwrap_or(Value::None)
  in test map closures to avoid potential panics on empty input slices.

search/chunk_vector_store.rs:
- Derive Eq on ChunkVectorDriftReport (was PartialEq only; all fields
  are Eq-compatible, and clippy::derive_partial_eq_without_eq fires).
- Use std::mem::size_of_val(vector) instead of manual len * size_of::<f32>()
  for embedding blob allocation.

search/chunking.rs:
- Remove dead assignment to allow_overlap_on_next_start after soft split;
  the variable was written but never read before being overwritten.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
